programs.title: PBS Newshour
programs.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news, presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programs.title: What Does Australia Really Think About
programs.desc: Casey Donovan investigates what Australia really thinks about obesity through emotional personal stories, confronting social experiments, covert filming and an in-depth nationwide survey.

programs.title: Seeds: Planting Hope Through Education
programs.desc: 'SEEDS: Planting Hope Through Education' is a grassroots documentary which transports you to Uganda and spotlights the crucial importance of education in eradicating poverty.

programs.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programs.desc: This one's for the crisp takers. Adam, hatted chef Will Houia and the Wolf of Wok Street Vincent Lim are all about their crispy business.

programs.title: Lost Treasures of Egypt
programs.desc: Archaeologists investigate the mysterious Pyramid Kings, and discover a lost temple.

programs.title: Jeopardy!
programs.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed, and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.
